name: anti-poisoning detects when a PRs author and approving reviewer are the same person
command: printf '{"pattern_id":"p1","supporting_prs":[{"number":1,"author":"alice","reviewer":"alice"}]}\n' > pat.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/safeguards.sh" --pattern pat.json --check self-approval 2>out.txt && grep -q 'flag=self-approval' out.txt && grep -q 'pr=1' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
